name: ICICI Platinum Chip Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹50,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 2 PAYBACK Points per ₹100 spent on all retail purchases

additionalBenefits: EMV chip-based card for enhanced security
Interest-free credit period up to 48 days
pros: Very low annual fee of ₹199, easily waivable
Easy approval for first-time credit card users
cons: Low reward rate of 0.50% effective return
No premium benefits or milestone rewards
idealFor: First-time credit card users building credit history
Users who want a basic, low-fee credit card from ICICI
Those who prefer simplicity over complex reward structures

faqs.question: How can I waive the annual fee on the ICICI Platinum Chip card?
faqs.answer: The annual fee of ₹199 is waived if you spend ₹50,000 or more in the previous anniversary year. This threshold is quite achievable with regular monthly spending.

faqs.question: What is the reward earning rate on this card?
faqs.answer: You earn 2 PAYBACK Points per ₹100 spent. Each PAYBACK Point is worth approximately ₹0.25, giving you an effective reward rate of about 0.50%.

faqs.question: Does this card offer any lounge access?
faqs.answer: No, the ICICI Platinum Chip Credit Card does not offer any domestic or international airport lounge access. Consider the ICICI Coral or Rubyx for lounge benefits.

faqs.question: Is this a good first credit card?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ICICI Platinum Chip is a decent entry-level card with a low fee and easy eligibility. It helps build a credit history with ICICI Bank, which can lead to upgrades to better cards like Coral or Rubyx.
